A very similar section on equipment cleaning (211.67) was included in the 1978 CGMP regulations.
In general, the hardware of a computer system is considered to be equipment within the meaning of the CGMP regulations.
In addition to following cGMP protocol, most companies, including mine have taken the initiative to get further certifications for our products and procedures.
